text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: This is it. We've reached the finals.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We're facing <chrname> on a stage
where she perhaps shines the brightest of all.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Right! After all the time we've spent together, we
owe it to our trainees to cheer them on with all
our might!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yes, a little. I've been striving to have you
succeed, and to show Trainer
<username> that I have it in
me to exceed all expectations.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I know we've both grown stronger because of
this. We've been able to overcome every loss and
conquer every weakness. So I know you can do
this.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. This time I'm ready. I've gotten so strong
and fast.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Get out there, Meek. Show our strongest rival
exactly what you're capable of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the URA Finale is about to
begin!
